title: fordia johorensis
intro: Fordia johorensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, commonly known as the Johore stinkwood or stinking stinkwood. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Fordia johorensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and essential oils.
